mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS dormId, bu.campus, bu.building_id, d.room_no, d.electricity_type FROM dorm d JOIN building bu ON bu.id = d.building_pk WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_binding ub WHERE ub.dorm_id = d.id)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO charge_record (dorm_id, balance, record_date) VALUES
(#{item.dormId}, #{item.balance}, #{item.recordDate})
mapper.select: SELECT cr.dorm_id, cr.balance, b.campus , b.building_name, d.room_no, d.electricity_type, cr.create_time FROM user_binding ub JOIN dorm d ON d.id = ub.dorm_id JOIN charge_record cr ON cr.dorm_id = d.id JOIN building b ON d.building_pk = b.id WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cr.create_time DESC LIMIT 10
